'''âg-n-h''' ('''ganaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monkeyfy|monkeyfy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monkeyfy|monkeyfy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| ganaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ganahithi|ganahithi]] || [[word:ganahiji|ganahiji]] || [[word:ganahishi|ganahishi]] || [[word:ganahi|ganahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ganahuthuth|ganahuthuth]] || [[word:ganahujuj|ganahujuj]] || [[word:ganahushush|ganahushush]] || [[word:ganah|ganah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganahuthu|ganahuthu]] || [[word:ganahuju|ganahuju]] || [[word:ganahushu|ganahushu]] || [[word:ganahu|ganahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganahufuth|ganahufuth]] || [[word:ganahufuj|ganahufuj]] || [[word:ganahufush|ganahufush]] || [[word:ganahuf|ganahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ganahethe|ganahethe]] || [[word:ganaheje|ganaheje]] || [[word:ganaheshe|ganaheshe]] || [[word:ganahe|ganahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ganahothoth|ganahothoth]] || [[word:ganahojoj|ganahojoj]] || [[word:ganahoshosh|ganahoshosh]] || [[word:ganah|ganah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganahotho|ganahotho]] || [[word:ganahojo|ganahojo]] || [[word:ganahosho|ganahosho]] || [[word:ganaho|ganaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganahofoth|ganahofoth]] || [[word:ganahofoj|ganahofoj]] || [[word:ganahofosh|ganahofosh]] || [[word:ganahof|ganahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ganahĂŠthĂŠ|ganahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ganahĂŠjĂŠ|ganahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ganahĂŠshĂŠ|ganahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ganahĂŠ|ganahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ganahathath|ganahathath]] || [[word:ganahajaj|ganahajaj]] || [[word:ganahashash|ganahashash]] || [[word:ganah|ganah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganahatha|ganahatha]] || [[word:ganahaja|ganahaja]] || [[word:ganahasha|ganahasha]] || [[word:ganaha|ganaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganahafath|ganahafath]] || [[word:ganahafaj|ganahafaj]] || [[word:ganahafash|ganahafash]] || [[word:ganahaf|ganahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ganahasha|ganahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goganahasha|goganahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiganahasha|gokiganahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ganahnĂŒsha|ganahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goganahnknĂŒsha|goganahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiganahnĂŒsha|gokiganahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ganahshĂ«sha|ganahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goganahnkshĂ«sha|goganahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiganahshĂ«sha|gokiganahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ganahrosha|ganahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goganahnkrosha|goganahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiganahrosha|gokiganahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ganahmusha|ganahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goganahnkmusha|goganahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiganahmusha|gokiganahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ganahsherasha|ganahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goganahnksherasha|goganahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiganahsherasha|gokiganahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ganahngasha|ganahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goganahnkngasha|goganahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiganahngasha|gokiganahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ganahyasha|ganahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goganahnkyasha|goganahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiganahyasha|gokiganahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ganahyamasha|ganahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goganahnkyamasha|goganahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiganahyamasha|gokiganahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ganahnĂŒshĂ«sha|ganahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goganahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goganahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiganahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiganahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ganahnĂŒrosha|ganahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goganahnknĂŒrosha|goganahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiganahnĂŒrosha|gokiganahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ganahnĂŒmusha|ganahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goganahnknĂŒmusha|goganahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiganahnĂŒmusha|gokiganahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ganahshĂ«nĂŒsha|ganahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goganahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goganahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiganahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiganahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ganahshĂ«rosha|ganahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goganahnkshĂ«rosha|goganahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiganahshĂ«rosha|gokiganahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ganahshĂ«musha|ganahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goganahnkshĂ«musha|goganahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiganahshĂ«musha|gokiganahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ganahronĂŒsha|ganahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goganahnkronĂŒsha|goganahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiganahronĂŒsha|gokiganahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ganahroshĂ«sha|ganahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goganahnkroshĂ«sha|goganahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiganahroshĂ«sha|gokiganahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ganahromusha|ganahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goganahnkromusha|goganahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiganahromusha|gokiganahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ganahmunĂŒsha|ganahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goganahnkmunĂŒsha|goganahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiganahmunĂŒsha|gokiganahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ganahmushĂ«sha|ganahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goganahnkmushĂ«sha|goganahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiganahmushĂ«sha|gokiganahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ganahmurosha|ganahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goganahnkmurosha|goganahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiganahmurosha|gokiganahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ganah|ganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠh|gĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoganah|hoganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠnĂŠh|hogĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoganah|hohoganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠnĂŠh|hohogĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒganah|nĂŒganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŒgĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒganah|nĂŒnĂŒganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻganah|nĂŻganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŻgĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻganah|nĂŻnĂŻganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luganah|luganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠnĂŠh|lugĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluganah|luluganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠnĂŠh|lulugĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liganah|liganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠnĂŠh|ligĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliganah|liliganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠnĂŠh|liligĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koganah|koganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠnĂŠh|kogĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoganah|kokoganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠnĂŠh|kokogĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keganah|keganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠnĂŠh|kegĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeganah|kekeganah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠnĂŠh|kekegĂŠnĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
